-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-7g3","title":"Implement jfp help command (full documentation)","description":"**Details:**
- `jfp help` shows comprehensive documentation
- Organized by category: Listing, Viewing, Copying, Installing, Registry, etc.
- Examples for common workflows
- Links to online documentation
- Pager support for long output

**Output Structure:**
```
USAGE
  jfp <command> [options]

COMMANDS

  Listing & Searching
    list                    List all prompts
    search <query>          Search prompts by query
    suggest <task>          Suggest prompts for a task

  Viewing
    show <id>               Show prompt details
    categories              List all categories
    tags                    List all tags with counts

  Copying & Exporting
    copy <id>               Copy prompt to clipboard
    render <id>             Render prompt with variables
    export <id>             Export as SKILL.md or markdown

  Installing Skills
    install <id>...         Install prompts as skills
    uninstall <id>...       Remove installed skills
    installed               List installed skills
    update                  Update installed skills

  Bundles
    bundles                 List available bundles
    bundle show <id>        Show bundle details

  Registry
    registry status         Show cache status
    registry refresh        Force cache refresh

  Utilities
    open <id>               Open prompt in browser
    doctor                  Check environment
    about                   About this tool
    completion              Generate shell completions

EXAMPLES
  jfp list --category ideation --json
  jfp search 'readme' --limit 5
  jfp install idea-wizard readme-reviser
  jfp render my-prompt --VAR=value

DOCUMENTATION
  https://jeffreysprompts.com/docs
```

**Reasoning:** Comprehensive help is essential for CLI discoverability. Agents and humans both benefit from well-organized documentation.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:02.703131871-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:02.703131871-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-7g3","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xdt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:43.460016979-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-blt","title":"Build CopyButton component with clipboard API","description":"**Details:**
- Reusable copy-to-clipboard button
- Uses navigator.clipboard.writeText
- Visual feedback: icon change + optional toast
- Supports multiple variants (primary, ghost, badge)
- Optional haptic feedback on mobile

**Implementation based on brennerbot:**
```typescript
// apps/web/src/components/ui/copy-button.tsx
'use client';

interface CopyButtonProps {
  text: string;
  variant?: 'default' | 'ghost' | 'badge';
  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';
  label?: string;
  onCopied?: () => void;
}

export function CopyButton({ text, variant = 'default', size = 'md', label, onCopied }: CopyButtonProps) {
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
  
  const handleCopy = async () => {
    try {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
      setCopied(true);
      
      // Haptic feedback on mobile
      if ('vibrate' in navigator) {
        navigator.vibrate(10);
      }
      
      onCopied?.();
      
      setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to copy:', error);
    }
  };
  
  return (
    <Button variant={variant} size={size} onClick={handleCopy}>
      {copied ? <Check className='size-4' /> : <Copy className='size-4' />}
      {label && <span>{copied ? 'Copied!' : label}</span>}
    </Button>
  );
}
```

**Variants:**
- default: Primary button style
- ghost: No background, icon only
- badge: Small inline badge style

**Location:** apps/web/src/components/ui/copy-button.tsx

**Reasoning:** Copy functionality is core to the product. A well-designed CopyButton with clear feedback creates trust that the action succeeded.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:36.485718304-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:42:50.874869614-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:42:50.874869614-05:00","close_reason":"CopyButton already present from brennerbot; added optional haptic feedback on success","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-blt","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-vsk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:14.148183549-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-c8l","title":"Implement tokenizer (search/tokenize.ts)","description":"**Details:**
- `tokenize(text)` splits text into searchable tokens
- Lowercase normalization
- Punctuation removal (preserve hyphens in compound words)
- Stopword filtering (the, a, an, is, are, etc.)
- Optional stemming (simple suffix stripping)
- Unicode normalization (NFD→NFC)

**Implementation:**
```typescript
export function tokenize(text: string): string[] {
  return text
    .toLowerCase()
    .normalize('NFD')
    .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, ' ')
    .split(/\s+/)
    .filter(token => token.length > 1 && !STOPWORDS.has(token));
}
```

**Stopwords:** Common English stopwords (50-100 words)

**Used By:** BM25 search, synonym expansion

**Reasoning:** Consistent tokenization is foundational for search quality. -{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xgh","title":"Create static registry routes (/registry.json, /registry.manifest.json)","description":"**Details:**
- Static JSON files generated at build time
- /registry.json - full prompt registry with all metadata
- /registry.manifest.json - checksums for cache validation

**/registry.json Format:**
```json
{
  "schemaVersion": 1,
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "updatedAt": "2026-01-10T00:00:00Z",
  "prompts": [...],
  "bundles": [...],
  "workflows": [...],
  "meta": {
    "totalPromptCount": 50,
    "categories": ["ideation", ...],
    "tags": ["ultrathink", ...]
  }
}
```

**/registry.manifest.json Format:**
```json
{
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "generatedAt": "2026-01-10T00:00:00Z",
  "checksums": {
    "registry": "sha256:abc123...",
    "prompts": {
      "idea-wizard": "sha256:def456...",
      ...
    }
  }
}
```

**Build Script Integration:**
- scripts/build-data.ts generates both files
- Files placed in apps/web/public/
- ETag headers based on manifest checksums
- CLI uses manifest for cache validation

**Location:** 
- apps/web/public/registry.json (generated)
- apps/web/public/registry.manifest.json (generated)

**Reasoning:** Static registry files enable CLI caching, offline PWA access, and efficient client-side search without API calls.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:33.677563084-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:33.677563084-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xgh","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-n3p","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:57.215409515-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xgh","title":"Create static registry routes (/registry.json, /registry.manifest.json)","description":"**Details:**
- Static JSON files generated at build time
- /registry.json - full prompt registry with all metadata
- /registry.manifest.json - checksums for cache validation

**/registry.json Format:**
```json
{
  "schemaVersion": 1,
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "updatedAt": "2026-01-10T00:00:00Z",
  "prompts": [...],
  "bundles": [...],
  "workflows": [...],
  "meta": {
    "totalPromptCount": 50,
    "categories": ["ideation", ...],
    "tags": ["ultrathink", ...]
  }
}
```

**/registry.manifest.json Format:**
```json
{
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "generatedAt": "2026-01-10T00:00:00Z",
  "checksums": {
    "registry": "sha256:abc123...",
    "prompts": {
      "idea-wizard": "sha256:def456...",
      ...
    }
  }
}
```

**Build Script Integration:**
- scripts/build-data.ts generates both files
- Files placed in apps/web/public/
- ETag headers based on manifest checksums
- CLI uses manifest for cache validation

**Location:** 
- apps/web/public/registry.json (generated)
- apps/web/public/registry.manifest.json (generated)

**Reasoning:** Static registry files enable CLI caching, offline PWA access, and efficient client-side search without API calls.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:33.677563084-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:39:27.800646247-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:39:27.800646247-05:00","close_reason":"Registry files already generated: registry.json and registry.manifest.json exist with proper schema version, checksums, and prompts data.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xgh","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-n3p","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:57.215409515-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
